zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Coles於1469年出生在英國維爾爾卡爾內時，她的父親Humphrey Cole30歲，母親Agnes Harbottle32歲。她於1484年與William Blake在英國哈普爾安多福結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年在英國哈普爾安多福享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Coles于1469年出生在英国維爾爾卡爾內时，她的父亲Humphrey Cole30岁，母亲Agnes Harbottle32岁。她于1484年与William Blake在英国哈普爾安多福结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1560年在英国哈普爾安多福享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Coles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): variant of Cole , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Cole
meanings: English: usually from the Middle English and Old French personal name Col(e), Coll(e), Coul(e), a pet form of Nicol (see Nichol and Nicholas ), a common personal name from the mid 13th century onward. English families with this name migrated to Scotland and to Ulster (especially Fermanagh).

English: occasionally perhaps from a different (early) Middle English personal name Col, of native English or Scandinavian origin. Old English Cola was originally a nickname from Old English col ‘coal’ in the sense ‘coal-black (of hair), swarthy’ and is the probable source of most of the examples in Domesday Book. In the northern and eastern counties of England settled by Vikings in the 10th and 11th centuries, alternative sources are Old Norse Kolr and Koli (either from a nickname ‘the swarthy one’ or a short form of names in Kol-), and Old Norse Kollr (from a nickname, perhaps ‘the bald one’).
English: nickname for someone with swarthy skin or black hair, from Middle English col, coul(e) ‘charcoal, coal’ (Old English col).

variants.name: Collis
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Collins  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Coles was born in 1469, in Calne, Wiltshire, England, her father, Humphrey Cole, was 30 and her mother, Agnes Harbottle, was 32. She married William Blake in 1484, in Andover, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1560, in Andover, Hampshire, England, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Coles est née en 1469, à Calne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Cole, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Harbottle, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé William Blake en 1484, à Andover, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1560, à Andover, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Colesが1469年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアカルンで生まれた時，父Humphrey Coleは30歳，母Agnes Harbottleは32歳であった。1484年にイギリスハンプシュアイアアンドバーでWilliam Blakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1560年にイギリスハンプシュアイアアンドバーで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Coles(이)가 1469년 영국 윌츠히르 캘니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey Cole(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Harbottle(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1484년 영국 함프실르 앤도버에서 William Blake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 영국 함프실르 앤도버에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Coles родилась в 1469 г. в местности калн, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey Cole было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Harbottle, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Blake в 1484 г. в местности андовир, хампшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1560 г. в местности андовир, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 91 год.
